common.pendingOnboardingSaveError: Your account was created, but we could not save the remaining setup. Please try again.
common.pendingOnboardingCompletionError: We could not finish setting up your account. Please sign in and try again.
common.profileLoadError: We could not load your account profile. Please try signing in again.
common.profileMissingError: Your account profile is not ready yet. Please try signing in again.

landing.title: Run your team from one place.
landing.description: Team management for school hockey programs and independent coaches.

signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.description: Use the email and password linked to your Clutch account.

accountType.title: Are you a coach or a director?
accountType.description: Choose the role that matches how you will use Clutch.
accountType.directorDescription: Create and manage a school hockey organization.
accountType.coachDescription: Create your coach account now, then choose your team setup after signing in.

coachSignup.title: Create your coach account
coachSignup.description: Use your email and password to create an account. You will choose your organization or team after signing in.
coachSignup.confirmationPendingMessage: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in to finish setting up your team access.

directorSignup.title: Create your organization
directorSignup.description: Create your account and the school organization you direct.
directorSignup.confirmationPendingMessage: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in to finish setting up your organization.
directorSignup.onboardingError: Unable to create your organization. Please try again.

completeCoachOnboarding.title: Complete your account
completeCoachOnboarding.description: Choose how you want to start coaching. This must be completed before using the rest of the app.
completeCoachOnboarding.joinDescription: Use the join code shared by your organization director.
completeCoachOnboarding.joinFormDescription: Enter your organization code and the team you coach.
completeCoachOnboarding.joinRequiredError: Enter the organization code and team name.
completeCoachOnboarding.independentDescription: Create a team without joining a school organization.
completeCoachOnboarding.independentFormDescription: Start with your own team. You will not need an organization code.
completeCoachOnboarding.joinError: Unable to join the organization. Please try again.
completeCoachOnboarding.independentError: Unable to create your team. Please try again.

home.title: Team hub
home.description: Welcome, {{name}}. Choose what you want to manage today.
home.directorDescription: View every team in your organization or manage the join code coaches use to join.
home.noActiveTeamDescription: No active team is available yet.
home.superAdminDescription: Moderation tools are outside this Week 2 UI slice.

teamSwitcher.title: Switch teams
teamSwitcher.description: Choose the team you want to work with in this session.

directorOnly.title: Director access only
directorOnly.description: This screen is only available to directors.

directorAllTeams.title: All Teams
directorAllTeams.description: Every team in your organization appears here.
directorAllTeams.noSchoolError: Your organization could not be found.
directorAllTeams.emptyDescription: Teams will appear here once coaches join or teams are created.

directorSettings.title: Director Settings
directorSettings.description: Manage organization settings coaches need during onboarding.
directorSettings.noSchoolError: Your organization could not be found.
directorSettings.loadError: Unable to load your organization settings.
directorSettings.joinCodeDescription: Share this code with coaches so they can join your organization.
directorSettings.regenerateError: Unable to regenerate the join code. Please try again.
directorSettings.regenerateDuplicateError: Unable to generate a unique code. Please try again.
directorSettings.confirmDescription: This invalidates the old code immediately. Anyone with the old code will no longer be able to join.

roster.title: Roster
roster.emptyDescription: Add your first player to start building this roster.
roster.noActiveTeamDescription: Choose a team before opening its roster.

playerForm.statusNotePlaceholder: Optional note about availability or restrictions
playerForm.medicalNotesPlaceholder: Allergies, medication, injury notes, or other important details
playerForm.requiredError: First name, last name, and natural position are required.
playerForm.jerseyNumberError: Jersey number must be between 1 and 99.
playerForm.duplicateJerseyError: Another player on this team already has that jersey number.
playerForm.removeConfirmDescription: This removes the player from the roster. This cannot be undone.

games.title: Games
games.emptyDescription: Create your first game to start planning the schedule.
games.noActiveTeamDescription: Choose a team before opening its games.

gameForm.dateEmpty: Select a game date and time.
gameForm.requiredError: Opponent name and date are required.

lineup.title: Lineup
lineup.playerPoolDescription: Tap a jersey to select a player, then tap an empty slot to place them.
lineup.emptyPlayerPool: Every player in this view has been placed.
lineup.applySavedDescription: Copy a lineup from another saved game on this team. Review it, then tap Save Lineup.
lineup.applySavedEmpty: No other saved lineups are available yet.
lineup.applySuccess: Saved lineup applied. Review and save this game.
lineup.applyUnavailableError: Cannot apply this lineup because these players are unavailable: {{players}}.
lineup.noGoalies: No goalies are listed on this roster yet.
lineup.goalieSkaterSlotError: Goalies can only be selected in the goalie section.
lineup.statusWarningDescription: {{playerName}} is marked {{status}}. Place them in the lineup anyway?
lineup.resetConfirmDescription: This clears only the current lineup view. Other views stay unchanged.
